name: Insert Greatest Common Divisors in Linked List
description: Given the head of a linked list, insert a new node with the GCD of every pair of adjacent nodes between them. Return the modified list.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [1, 5000]. 1 <= Node.val <= 1000.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long lists that punish rebuilding intermediate prefixes or rescanning neighbors instead of one pass with local gcd insertion
